zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Hedde於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾伍德福特時，他的父親Robert Hedde I46歲，母親Margaret de Davenport42歲。他於1490年與Lady Margaret Holland在英國藍卡爾丹頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1489年被列為husbandman。他去世於1528年12月1日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hedde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the medieval personal name Hidde, a shortened form of Hildebrand or a similar name containing the Old High German element hild ‘battle, strife’.

variants.name: Hildebrand
meanings: German, Swedish, and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hildebrand (Old Norse Hildibrandr), composed of the elements hild ‘battle’ + brand ‘sword, firebrand’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Hedde was born about 1465, in Woodford, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Hedde I, was 46 and his mother, Margaret de Davenport, was 42. He married Lady Margaret Holland in 1490, in Denton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1489, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as husbandman. He died on 1 December 1528, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Il a épousé Lady Margaret Holland en 1490, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1489, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est husbandman. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1528, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.
